name: Tonkatsu Tamafuji
tagline: Kaimuki's tonkatsu master — perfectly fried heritage pork cutlets with house-ground cabbage and secret dipping sauce.
parking: Street parking on Waialae Ave; small lot behind
talkStory: This Kaimuki gem serves what many locals consider the best tonkatsu on the island. The pork cutlets are made with premium heritage pork, breaded in ultra-fine panko, and fried to an impossibly crispy golden exterior while staying juicy inside. The house-ground cabbage is fluffy and fresh, and the dipping sauce has a secret recipe. Lunch lines form early — arrive by 11:30am or expect a 30-minute wait.
